decisions.decision: Hero changed from animated SVG to Higgsfield AI-humanoid video (3334cf4d1)
decisions.rationale: Superseded SVG-externalization work. Higher-impact brand signal. Earlier CR-01 img-restore is now moot (intentional replacement, not regression).

decisions.decision: F-07 CI guards adopted as institutional-memory pattern
decisions.rationale: Each guard documents the incident commit. Pattern: regression class -> add guard -> document incident -> ship together.
Removal forfeited Google sitelinks-search-box for no benefit. Canonical satisfies F-07-SEARCH-CANON.

decisions.decision: Sitemap split (priority+full+index); only index in robots.txt
decisions.rationale: Crawl-budget signal for young domain. Children submitted in GSC for redundancy. Atomic writes prevent half-written deploys.
Carlos explicit. Higgsfield + Kling 3.0 access removed the capacity constraint.

uncommitted_files: crm-vanilla/backup-status.json (auto-managed by auto-save daemon on every Stop hook, NOT manual work)
next_action: Audit-fix cycles are the current cadence. On resume: (1) if Carlos completed Meta Business Suite IG link, set IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID + IG_GRAPH_TOKEN and trigger first IG smoke-test; (2) otherwise continue audit-fix passes (gsd-code-reviewer on recent diff, classify, fix auto-fixable, commit, deploy, verify live); (3) optionally remove orphaned assets/hero-robot.svg. Prior 'check Higgsfield job 417e43b4' entry point is stale (batch done days ago, 11 folders populated).
context_notes: Carlos drives in terse one-word commands (deploy / fix all / audit). Wants forward motion, pushes back on gating questions. Auto-save daemon commits WIP every few min and races manual edits: rebase --autostash + verify HEAD before claiming success. mod_security 406s bare curl: always send Chrome UA + Origin/Referer. InMotion-only deploy via GitHub Actions FTPS. Credential-bound actions (IG/YouTube login, passwords) hard-blocked by safety rules regardless of repeated asks: hand to Carlos.

anti_patterns_discovered.pattern: Auto-save daemon swallowing in-flight edits (CR-01 class)
anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Hero img extraction lost when daemon committed a version without it during an edit race. Live homepage empty hero for ~3h. git log -S confirmed the tag never reached main. Caught only by file-scoped gsd-code-reviewer, not by my own success report.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: After multi-file edits: git log --oneline -3 + grep the committed/live file for the exact change before reporting success. Never trust Edit returned OK; verify post-rebase.

anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Plain curl to netwebmedia.com assets returns 406; looks like missing files. Real browser UA returns 200.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: Always send Mozilla/Chrome UA (+ Origin/Referer for state-changing). Third-party fetchers use real UAs so production is fine.

anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Claimed fixes shipped based on Edit returning OK or one curl, when the auto-save race or stale cache meant they were not live. CR-01 is worst case.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: Closeout reports must include a fresh cache-busted browser-UA curl against the live URL AND a git log check that the commit is on origin/main. 'Deployed' = verified live, not 'I committed it'.
